milestones.title: M1: Configuration & Documentation Foundation
milestones.description: Clean up configuration, document values, and prepare for framework work. Includes removing API key references, documenting Helm chart values, and adding Prometheus/ArgoCD endpoint overrides. ArgoCD Application sync/drift is out of scope; see M9.

tickets.title: Remove API Key References
tickets.description: Remove API key from Helm chart values, status calculator, registration module, and documentation.

tickets.title: Document Helm Chart Values
tickets.description: Create comprehensive documentation for all Helm chart values including core values, collection intervals, event storage, and ArgoCD configuration.

tickets.title: Add Configuration Overrides for Prometheus and ArgoCD Endpoints
tickets.description: Add configuration options to allow overriding Prometheus and ArgoCD endpoints and locations. Support auto-detection as default with explicit override capability.

milestones.title: M2: Well-Architected Framework Infrastructure
milestones.description: Implement core framework validation infrastructure including assessment system, scheduler, and storage.

tickets.title: Implement Well-Architected Framework Assessment System
tickets.description: Core assessment system implementation.

tickets.title: Design Assessment Architecture and Execution Flow
tickets.description: Design assessment architecture and execution flow.

tickets.title: Implement Assessment Database Schema and Migrations
tickets.description: Assessment database schema and migrations.

tickets.title: Create Assessment Check Interfaces and Core Types
tickets.description: Assessment check interfaces and core types.

tickets.title: Implement Assessment Check Registry and Validation
tickets.description: Assessment check registry and validation.

tickets.title: Implement Assessment Result Storage and Query APIs
tickets.description: Assessment result storage and query APIs.

tickets.title: Implement Assessment Runner Orchestration
tickets.description: Assessment runner orchestration.

tickets.title: Add Assessment CLI Commands and Output Formatters
tickets.description: Assessment CLI commands and output formatters.

tickets.title: Add Assessment Prometheus Metrics Instrumentation
tickets.description: Assessment Prometheus metrics instrumentation.

milestones.title: M3: Security Pillar
milestones.description: Complete security validation including Trivy image vulnerability scanning and all security checks.

tickets.title: Implement Image Vulnerability Scanning with Trivy
tickets.description: Integrate Trivy for container image vulnerability scanning, store results, create security assessment checks, CLI and metrics interfaces.

tickets.title: Implement Security Validation Checks
tickets.description: Security context validation, RBAC policy analysis, and secret management audit checks.

milestones.title: M4: Reliability & Performance
milestones.description: Implement reliability and performance efficiency checks.

tickets.title: Implement Reliability Pillar Checks
tickets.description: High availability, resource limits/requests, health probes, and backup/disaster recovery validation.

tickets.title: Implement Performance Efficiency Pillar Checks
tickets.description: Autoscaling configuration, resource quotas, and node affinity/placement validation.

milestones.title: M5: Cost & Operational Excellence
milestones.description: Implement cost optimization and operational excellence checks.

tickets.title: Implement Cost Optimization Pillar Checks
tickets.description: Resource ratio validation, over-provisioning detection, and spot instance usage validation.

tickets.title: Implement Operational Excellence Pillar Checks
tickets.description: Monitoring/observability, logging/audit trail, deployment strategies, and GitOps best practices.

milestones.title: M6: Sustainability & Framework Completion
milestones.description: Implement sustainability checks and complete framework with scheduler, CLI, status integration, documentation, and metrics.

tickets.title: Implement Sustainability Pillar Checks
tickets.description: Resource efficiency analysis and workload consolidation opportunities.

tickets.title: Implement Periodic Assessment Scheduler
tickets.description: Periodic assessment scheduler with configurable intervals, integrate into operator main loop, add assessment summary to status ConfigMap.

tickets.title: Complete Framework Documentation and Metrics
tickets.description: Document all framework checks, create user guide, and add assessment execution Prometheus metrics.

milestones.title: M7: Chart Repository & Distribution
milestones.description: Stand up charts.kube9.io for Helm chart distribution. S3 + CloudFront hosting, CDK stack, automated index.yaml on release. Enables helm install from official repo.

tickets.title: Implement Chart Repository Infrastructure
tickets.description: Stand up S3 bucket and CloudFront distribution for charts.kube9.io. Configure DNS and HTTPS.

tickets.title: Create CDK Stack for Chart Hosting
tickets.description: AWS CDK stack in infrastructure/ for S3, CloudFront, and automated index.yaml generation.

tickets.title: Add Chart Publishing to Release Pipeline
tickets.description: GitHub Actions workflow to package Helm chart and publish to charts.kube9.io on release.

milestones.title: M8: Data Collection Pipeline
milestones.description: Implement scheduled data collectors: cluster metadata (24h), resource inventory (6h), resource configuration patterns (12h). Store in SQLite collections table. Supports future insights and analytics.

tickets.title: Implement Cluster Metadata Collector
tickets.description: Collect Kubernetes version, cluster identifier, node count, provider, region/zone. 24h interval with random offset.

tickets.title: Implement Resource Inventory Collector
tickets.description: Collect namespace counts (hashed IDs), pod/deployment/statefulset/replicaset/service counts. 6h interval.

tickets.title: Implement Resource Configuration Patterns Collector
tickets.description: Collect limits/requests, replica counts, image pull policies, security contexts, probes, volume types. 12h interval.

tickets.title: Integrate Collection Scheduler with Operator
tickets.description: Register collectors with scheduler, add Helm configuration for intervals, integrate into operator main loop.

tickets.title: Add Collection Data CLI and Storage
tickets.description: Create collections table schema, implement CLI query commands for collection data, add storage directory creation.

milestones.title: M9: ArgoCD Application Integration
milestones.description: Implement ArgoCD Application sync/health status collection and drift detection. Populate argocd_apps table. Expose via CLI and status.

tickets.title: Implement ArgoCD Application Status Collector
tickets.description: Query ArgoCD API for Application sync and health status. Use M1 endpoint override config.

tickets.title: Implement Drift Detection Logic
tickets.description: Compare desired vs live state for Applications; detect and record drift events.

tickets.title: Add argocd_apps Schema and Storage
tickets.description: Create argocd_apps table, migrations, and storage layer for Application status data.

tickets.title: Expose ArgoCD Data via CLI and Status
tickets.description: Add query argocd apps CLI command and optional ArgoCD summary to status ConfigMap.
